issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for deployment and instrumentation.
The examples are placeholders and lack concrete code or step-by-step instructions.

scenarios.name: instrument-node-traces-with-correlated-logs
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the exact NodeSDK Resource pattern with ATTR_SERVICE_NAME/deployment.environment, OTLP exporters to :4318, getNodeAutoInstrumentations with fs disabled, and a pino mixin that injects trace_id/span_id/trace_flags from trace.getSpan(context.active()) — baseline covers OTel basics but misses the pino correlation pattern.

scenarios.name: tail-sampling-and-clickhouse-retention
scenarios.rationale: Treatment cites the skill's tail-based sampling in the OTel Collector for high-traffic services, ClickHouse retention tuning, and per-service RED dashboards; baseline gives generic tail_sampling advice without skill-specific guidance.
